## 📝 Description
## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring / Infrastructure (no functional changes)

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Manual verification (e.g., Postman/Insomnia)

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the **Google PEP 257** docstring style.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (Sphinx).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (Ruff/Mypy).
- [ ] (If applicable) Database migrations have been generated and tested.
